Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Cynara]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Crimson Vault ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 3''' — Cynara is described as mad.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 8''' — Cynara is paranoid, delusional, and trapped inside her palace rooms.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 15''' — Cynara is Leah's sister who had an accident in Asphodel.}}

== City of Light ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 10''' — Cynara searched for dark weapons to stop Rhalia's rampage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 11''' — Cynara sits on a carved wooden throne in the antechamber of Ragnarus.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 19''' — Leah has an insane sister named Cynara.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 27''' — Cynara appeared in a red flash.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 27''' — Cynara's dress was made of scarlet light.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
